summary: Experience Mode System Testing - Backend APIs 100% pass (23/23 tests). Frontend has a critical bug: Dashboard shows full view instead of EssentialDashboard for Essential mode users due to race condition in mode loading.

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard shows full view instead of EssentialDashboard for Essential mode users. Race condition: dashboard data loads before mode data, causing full dashboard to render instead of EssentialDashboard.
ui_bugs.root_cause: In index.tsx line 122-136, the code checks `!modeLoading && mode === 'essential'` but if modeLoading is true and loading is false, it falls through to show the full dashboard. Need to add modeLoading check before showing full dashboard.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Add `if (modeLoading) { return <LoadingSpinner /> }` before line 128 to wait for mode to load before deciding which dashboard to show.

ui_bugs.issue: Tax screen shows loading spinner indefinitely when navigating via bottom tab. The modeLoading state appears to not resolve properly.
ui_bugs.root_cause: Similar race condition - the Tax screen shows loading while modeLoading is true, but modeLoading may not be resolving correctly after navigation.

integration_issues.issue: EssentialDashboard component is not being rendered for Essential mode users. Full dashboard with Tax Meter, Financial Health, etc. is shown instead.

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: In /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx, add modeLoading check before showing full dashboard. Add `if (modeLoading) { return <LoadingSpinner /> }` before line 128.
FIX: Verify ExperienceModeContext is properly setting modeLoading to false after fetching mode data.
VERIFY: After fix, Essential mode users should see EssentialDashboard with AI Morning Brief, 3-card snapshot, and Smart Alerts.
VERIFY: Tax screen should show locked view with 'Upgrade to Plus' button for Essential mode users.
critical_code_review_comments: Race condition in index.tsx: Dashboard data (loading) can finish before mode data (modeLoading), causing full dashboard to render for Essential mode users.
The condition `!modeLoading && mode === 'essential'` is correct but needs a fallback loading state when modeLoading is true.
Backend APIs are working correctly - all 23 tests passed including mode switching, feature gating, and Essential mode endpoints.

success_rate.frontend: 50% - Dashboard not showing EssentialDashboard for Essential mode users

context_for_next_testing_agent: Experience Mode backend APIs are fully working. Frontend has a race condition bug in index.tsx where the full dashboard renders before mode data loads. The fix is to add a modeLoading check before showing the full dashboard. After fix, verify: 1) Essential mode users see EssentialDashboard, 2) Tax screen shows locked view for Essential users, 3) Books screen shows locked view for Essential/Plus users, 4) Mode switching works in Settings.

backend_apis.GET /api/experience/mode: PASS - Returns current_mode, mode_info, available_features, hidden_features
backend_apis.PUT /api/experience/mode: PASS - Switches between essential, plus, full modes
backend_apis.GET /api/experience/features: PASS - Returns all features with availability
backend_apis.auth_required: PASS - All endpoints return 401 without token

frontend_ui.dashboard_essential_mode: FAIL - Shows full dashboard instead of EssentialDashboard
frontend_ui.tax_screen_locked_view: NOT TESTED - Tax screen stuck in loading state

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Dashboard shows full view instead of EssentialDashboard for Essential mode users
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Race condition in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx. The dashboard data (loading state) finishes loading before the mode data (modeLoading state) finishes loading. The code at line 122-124 checks `!modeLoading && mode === 'essential'` but if modeLoading is still true, it falls through to line 128 which checks `loading`. If loading is false (dashboard data loaded), it renders the full dashboard instead of waiting for mode data.
reproduction_steps: 1. Set user mode to 'essential' via API
4. Observe dashboard - shows full dashboard with Tax Meter, Financial Health instead of EssentialDashboard
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add modeLoading check before showing full dashboard: `if (modeLoading) { return <LoadingSpinner /> }` before line 128 in index.tsx
